title: celmisia saxifraga
intro: Celmisia saxifraga, also known as the Mountain Daisy or Saxifrage, is a species of flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to help with wound healing, reducing pain and swelling, and fighting off infections. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including protecting against cell damage, reducing oxidative stress, and supporting cardiovascular health. Celmisia saxifraga is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
